questionHtml: The peak wavelength of radiation from Eta Cassiopeiae A is 490 nm. Show that the surface temperature of Eta Cassiopeiae A is about 6000 K.
markschemeHtml:
«T=2.9×10-3490×10-9»

5900 K ✔

NOTE: Answer 6000 K is given in the question.
Answer must be to at least 2 s.f. OR correct working.

meta.title: The peak wavelength of radiation from Eta Cassiopeiae A is 490 nm. Show that the surface temperature of Eta Cassiopeiae A is about 6000 K.
